title: Canadian Construction Law Blog
content:
## Canadian Construction Law Blog
Trends, developments and hot-topic issues affecting the Canadian construction industry
This blog provides information on the trends, developments and business issues affecting the Canadian construction landscape. Drawing on insights from across the Firm, it covers a full range of construction-related topics, from project structuring, procurement, risk management, legal updates, as well as other litigation and dispute resolution topics. This blog is relevant to all construction and infrastructure industry professionals with projects in Canada and offers insightful commentary on recent cases and statutory developments that can have an impact on the industry.
All form fields are required " * "
